violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. PIC discarded ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
Prep unit/cold drawers located on the cook line was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the deep freezer chests have an accumulation of ice, dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units, and cold drawer units have an accumulation of food residue, protective delivery plastic, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
The insulation on the hood duct is in poor repair, hanging down with frayed edges. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2024
A painted pipe near the cooking area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2024
The hood is in poor repair, not functioning properly. Parts are on order. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024

Ceiling lights near the hood have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

An employee did not wash their hands after putting on hair restraint and rubbing eyes before putting on gloves. An employee observed not washing hands when beginning shift, before starting food prep. When To Wash handout provided to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The hand-washing sink in the Nourish kitchen was lacking paper towels due to dispenser not working. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The hand-washing sink in the women's toilet room was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, and robot coupe) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Raw chicken was observed held at 54-55 degrees Fahrenheit in a cold drawer unit. Tomatoes and coleslaw was observed at 44-45 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in freezer to rapidly chill. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Thermometers are lacking in some refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in the cabinet beneath ice bins. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.Big Blue Bug PCS. Last date of service 6/1/2024. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The door to the outside, located in the dining room of Nourish, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the outdoor storage unit. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The lid for the 3-section dry storage bins was not in good repair, cracked with pieces missing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:can opener baserobot coupe basecold drawer unitprep unitsknife rack New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The floors, walls, and some areas of ceiling throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The hood is in poor repair, not functioning properly. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
One light bulb beneath the hood is in poor repair, broken. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The bottom edge of the hood had an accumulation of oil droplets. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.Oil droplets were cleaned during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
Ceiling lights near the hood have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The wall-mounted box with cords running through it near the dishwasher has an accumulation of dead insects and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

A painted pipe near the cooking area is in poor repair, with the paint melted and chipping off in areas. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2024

The outside area along the building has an accumulation of leaf litter and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2024
